detail.description: Jordan Beck triples (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Carson Benge. Willi Castro scores.
Jordan Beck doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Kyle Karros scores. Jordan Beck to 3rd.
Jordan Beck singles on a line drive to left fielder Teoscar Hernández. Willi Castro to 3rd.
Jordan Beck singles on a line drive to first baseman Dalton Rushing. Kyle Karros to 3rd.
Jordan Beck doubles (2) on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Teoscar Hernández.
Jordan Beck homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Jordan Beck singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
Jordan Beck singles on a ground ball to third baseman Sal Stewart. Kyle Karros to 3rd. Ezequiel Tovar to 2nd.
Jordan Beck singles on a line drive to left fielder TJ Friedl.

Jordan Beck doubles (1) on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Hunter Goodman scores. Willi Castro scores. TJ Rumfield scores. Jordan Beck to 3rd. Jordan Beck advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Otto Lopez.
Jordan Beck singles on a ground ball to shortstop Otto Lopez. Willi Castro scores. Ezequiel Tovar to 3rd. TJ Rumfield to 2nd.
Jordan Beck doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Jordan Beck doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder Billy Cook.
Jordan Beck singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm.
Jordan Beck singles on a line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Hunter Goodman scores. Tyler Freeman to 3rd.
